## Funding

### Current External Research Funding

::: {.grant}
#### 1. NIA-5R01AG080635-03 — Validation of the Remote Cognitive Aging and Alzheimer’s Disease Research (R-CARE) Toolbox for Diverse Populations

**Role:** Principal Investigator of subaward

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** 2023–2028

**Total Costs:** $868,564

**PI / Prime:** Prime: Albert Einstein College of Medicine

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search)
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 2. NIA-5R21AG078846-02 — Perceived Ethnic Discrimination and Cognitive Function in Mexican-origin Adults

**Role:** Principal Investigator of subaward

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** 2022–2024

**Total Costs:** $90,232

**PI / Prime:** Prime: University of Texas at Austin; PI: Dr. Liz Muñoz

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search)
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 3. NIA-5P01AG003949-12 — Einstein Aging Study, Project: Air Pollution and Cognitive Function

**Role:** Co-Principal Investigator

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** 2022–2027

**Total Costs:** $911,768; 35% allocation

**PI / Prime:** Albert Einstein College of Medicine; Co-PI: Dr. Charles B. Hall

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/project-details/11092245)
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 4. NIA-5P01AG003949-12 — Einstein Aging Study, Core: Technology and Data Management Core

**Role:** Core Leader; Principal Investigator of subaward

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** 2022–2027

**Total Costs:** $1,696,559; 19% allocation

**PI / Prime:** Albert Einstein College of Medicine

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search/sTurp4Mlm0y-kLmPPdCgSQ/project-details/11092267)
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 5. NIA-U2CAG060408 — Mobile Monitoring of Cognitive Change (M2C2)

**Role:** Principal Investigator of subaward while at University of Central Florida

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** 2022–2023

**Total Costs:** $50,000

**PI / Prime:** Prime award

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search)
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 6. NIA-R44AG056250 — A Non-Pharmacological Multi-Modal Therapy to Improve Sleep and Cognition and Reduce Mild Cognitive Impairment Risk

**Role:** Principal Investigator of subaward while at University of Central Florida

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** 2021–2022

**Total Costs:** $14,685

**PI / Prime:** Prime: Proactive Life, Inc.

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search)
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 7. NIA-R03AG067009 — Investigating Medication Errors in Daily Life: Discovering Person-specific and Situation-specific Risk Factors

**Role:** Principal Investigator

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** July 2020–May 2022

**Total Costs:** $149,000

**PI / Prime:** **Nelson A. Roque**

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search/mg5_EPGNUEOk8qjMvM2JUA/project-details/10202481)
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 8. NIA-240459 — Advancing Mobile Monitoring of Intraindividual Change in Alzheimer’s Disease and Related Dementias: Building an Open and Inclusive Infrastructure

**Role:** Co-Core Leader, Data Management and Analytics Core

**Sponsor:** NIH/NIA

**Period:** 2024–2029

**Total Costs:** $19,844,799

**Public Record:** [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search/z-Zq4ZPDxkmZB8t_9Kda9w/project-details/11118298)

**Core allocations:** Technical Core, 10%, $4,372,510; Data Core, 10%, $2,142,145
:::

::: {.grant}
#### 9. The Peanut Institute Foundation — Peanut butter, glycemic control, cognition, and cardiovascular health.

**Role:** Co-Investigator

**Sponsor:** The Peanut Institute (TPI) Foundation

**Period:** May 2026-June 2027

**Total Costs:** $290,000

**PI / Prime:** **Nelson A. Roque**
:::
